title: tarenna oblanceolata
intro: Tarenna oblanceolata, also known as the Oblanceolate Tarenna, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, due to its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Tarenna oblanceolata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support respiratory health. Tarenna oblanceolata can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, and it can also be used in traditional folk medicine to create medicinal preparations such as extracts and ointments.
